title: try_set_nickname returns Set when UPDATE touches 0 rows
description: store.rs:556: match result { Ok(_) => Ok(SetNicknameResult::Set) } does not check rows_affected(). If pub_id does not exist in users (e.g., a race where the user row was pruned between authentication and SET_NICKNAME), the UPDATE matches 0 rows and the caller receives Set — a false success. The nickname is not stored but the caller is not informed. Fix: check result.rows_affected() == 1 and return Err or a new NotFound variant if it is 0.
